repo_prior_art.cite: parent only; no in-catalogue shared many-neighborhood retained-mass image

published_prior_art.cite: gerard_rokkanen_rothe_2020_rdbounds and rosenman_rajkumar_gauriot_slonim_2019_discrete_manipulation are one-window manipulated-RD objects
rosenman_rajkumar_gauriot_slonim_2019_discrete_manipulation: computation-oriented one-window partial-ID procedure, not a nested-window laminar flow oracle
chernozhukov_lee_rosen_2013_intersection_bounds: generic intersection-bound inference, not an RD-specific dual oracle or joint-versus-separate frontier

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: Assumption rational indexes the score lattice by p_b(y_b-lambda_j), but the centered oracle in Section 6 and Conjecture 2 uses p_b xi_{j,b}(lambda), including the left-limit residual c_j(lambda_j); the assumption must be centered or the result must assume zero left-side means.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 3
soundness_flags.one_line: The stated assumptions include the strict-gap witness class, which fixes J=2, but clause 1 says 'if J=1' and claims parent dual recovery; split the J=1 parent-dual clause under parent-face assumptions or restate Conjecture 3 with separate cases.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the uncentered lattice condition in Assumption rational with a centered condition on p_b xi_{j,b}(lambda), or explicitly add the zero-left-mean face to Conjecture 2.
Split Conjecture 3 into a J=1 parent-dual recovery statement and a J=2 strict joint-gap statement so each uses the correct assumptions.
Add a precise theorem/section anchor in Gerard-Rokkanen-Rothe and Rosenman et al. for the one-window comparator claims, not just abstract-level citations.

recommended_next_step: Patch the two assumption/statement coherence issues; the novelty kernel survives on both repo and published axes.

upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The computation upgrade is delivered via the centered fixed-lambda STATEFLOW map, explicit graph-size bounds on the prefix-compressed face, and a worked J=1 dual boundary recovery, though two coherence patches are still needed.
